pi_items.source: Confirmed in task.json line 19, setup_task.sh line 12, and export_result.sh line 11
Confirmed in task.json line 20, setup_task.sh line 8, and export_result.sh line 11
Task description explicitly states 'Create a 3-page science flipchart'. Verifier checks for exactly 3 pages (verifier.py lines 62-71). Export script counts pages (export_result.sh line 55).
All terms appear in task description. Export script checks for these terms (export_result.sh lines 64-70). Verifier scores based on presence of these terms (verifier.py lines 84-103).

Task description requires 'YELLOW SUN (circle/ellipse)' and 'arrows pointing TO and FROM the plant'. Export script checks for circle/ellipse/oval shapes (export_result.sh line 74) and arrows/lines (export_result.sh line 79). Verifier scores sun shape and arrow detection (verifier.py lines 106-116).

privileged_info_summary: The photosynthesis_process_diagram task requires creating a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart file at /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/photosynthesis_lesson.flipchart containing specific educational content about photosynthesis. The diagram must include visual elements (sun as circle/ellipse and directional arrows) representing inputs (Sunlight, Water, Carbon Dioxide) and outputs (Oxygen, Glucose) of photosynthesis, along with the chemical equation and process definition. All metadata specifications align with the task requirements and verification logic.
